wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Press+Start+2P&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Press Start 2P',monospace!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#7c2d12!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#c2410c!important;border-bottom:4px solid #fde047!important;box-shadow:0 4px 0 #7c2d12!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{font-size:11px!important;letter-spacing:.05em;padding:14px 20px!important;color:#fde047!important;text-shadow:2px 2px 0 #7c2d12;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(253,224,71,.2)!important;transition:all .1s;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{background:#fde047!important;color:#7c2d12!important;text-shadow:1px 1px 0 rgba(124,45,18,.3)!important;} .arcade-header{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#c2410c,#7c2d12);padding:24px 20px;border-bottom:3px solid #fde047;text-align:center;} .arcade-header h4{color:#fde047;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-shadow:2px 2px 0 #7c2d12;margin:0 0 6px;} .arcade-header span.sub{color:#fdba74;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.05em;display:block;} .blink{animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;} @keyframes blink{50%{opacity:0}} .wpr_social_icons{padding:14px 20px;border-top:3px solid rgba(253,224,71,.3);display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;} .wpr_social_icons a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:34px;height:34px;border:2px solid rgba(253,224,71,.4);transition:all .1s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{border-color:#fde047;background:rgba(253,224,71,.1);}
content_before_menu_element:
🕹 RETRO ZONE

► INSERT COIN ◄
